description: Celebrate Black History Month with our vibrant, modern email template. Ideal for promoting a unique podcast episode or a special edition show, this template is designed to capture the essence of black history, its influential athletes, and the role of black individuals in the entertainment industry. The design incorporates a captivating glitch and gradient animation, perfect for media promotions and seasonal events. This template is a great fit for software and technology companies, and media & entertainment platforms looking to promote Black History Month content. It can also be used by sport apps and platforms to highlight the achievements of black athletes. Download this template to add a modern, engaging touch to your Black History Month promotions.
short_description: Celebrate Black History Month with this modern email template, perfect for promoting special podcasts or shows. Highlighting black history, athletes, and entertainment, the template features captivating glitch and gradient animation. Ideal for tech companies, media & entertainment platforms, sport apps, and seasonal promotions. Download now to enhance your Black History Month campaigns.

designer.description: Hi, I'm Betina, a digital designer currently working across emails, digital campaigns and social media.
